targetUser: Founder, support lead or knowledge owner reviewing public FAQ material.
businessJob: Turn public FAQ and knowledge snippets into a reviewable answer surface for later human approval.
valueHypothesis: A future Capsule could help teams organize public knowledge into consistent review notes without exposing private prompts or data.
day1UserBenefit: A visitor sees how a Capsule could structure public FAQ snippets without provider calls, a live chatbot or regulated advice.

publicSafeExamples: Generic audience question with no personal identifiers
forbiddenData: No email, phone, DNI, customerId or tenantId
No provider key, API key or connector payload
No prompt text, raw evidence or private runtime path

runtimeBoundary: No private runtime is included; this manifest is not executable and does not answer users directly.
connectorBoundary: No connector execution is included; provider calls, chat surfaces and knowledge systems remain outside C03.
dataBoundary: No secrets, no customer data, no telemetry, no PII, no prompt text, no raw evidence and no connector payloads are included.
complianceBoundary: No regulated advice, compliance certification, legal audit proof or ROI guarantee is provided.
ipBoundary: This public manifest preserves the source-available launcher posture and does not expose private runtime code.
cloudHandoffBoundary: Future Cloud handoff would require separate approved implementation and review before any hosted behavior exists.
localByokBoundary: Future local/BYOK setup would require separate configuration work; no API keys are requested here.
futureImplementationNotes: A future implementation would require private runtime review semantics outside this public manifest.
A future implementation would require approved provider and data boundaries before any live answer surface exists.
C03 ships manifest only, not executable template behavior.
